description_long: This is a compact, modern loveseat upholstered in a light beige fabric, featuring clean lines and a minimalist silhouette. The couch has two separate seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and well-padded for comfort. The armrests are straight and moderately high, matching the height of the backrest and providing a boxy, contemporary look. The legs are short, exposed, and made of wood, with a simple, slightly tapered design that elevates the couch just above the floor. The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or tufting. This piece is suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A modern, light beige loveseat with two seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and short wooden legs. The design is minimalist and upholstered in smooth, solid fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seat and two back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the couch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, boxy armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid back panel and the exposed wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, with a clear look at the leg placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two loose seat cushions and two loose backrest cushions, all rectangular and evenly spaced, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light beige fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, exposed wooden legs with a simple, slightly tapered design, positioned at each corner.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight backrest with two loose, rectangular cushions, matching the seat cushions in size and style.
